title: IMMZ.Z.DE34 ValueSet for Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccines (Td) Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.Z.DE34 ValueSet for Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccines (Td) ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.
